market_context:
Cohort size: 201 listings scraped in the same market.
Median nightly rate: £154.60
Median 90-day occupancy: 47.8%

title_variants: Cozy 2BR City Apt – Sleeps 6, Parking Included
analysis.rewritten_desc: Welcome to your modern 2‑bedroom apartment in the heart of the city, perfect for up to 4 guests. This entire home offers a spacious living area, a fully equipped kitchen, and two comfortable bedrooms, each with fresh linens and ample storage. Enjoy the convenience of free on‑site parking, a rare perk in this market. While the building does not feature a private outdoor terrace, you’ll find nearby parks and cafés within walking distance. Stay connected with high‑speed Wi‑Fi and unwind with a flat‑screen TV in the living room. The bathroom is stocked with plush towels and essential toiletries for a hassle‑free stay. Guests have praised the spotless cleanliness and the quiet neighbourhood, reflected in a solid 4.65 rating from 344 reviews. Although we’re not a Superhost yet, we’re committed to delivering a comfortable and affordable stay at just £90 per night—significantly lower than the city’s median nightly rate of £154.60. The apartment is just a 5‑minute walk from the main subway station, giving easy access to top attractions, museums, and shopping districts. Flexible self‑check‑in with a keypad lock lets you arrive at any time. We also provide fresh coffee, a kettle and basic pantry items to kick‑start your mornings. Book now to experience great value, easy parking, and a welcoming space for families or small groups visiting the city.
analysis.photo_order_rec: Use an exterior shot showing the building façade and the free parking spot as the cover photo; it instantly highlights the rare parking perk and sets expectations.
key_diagnosis: Your nightly rate of £90 is 42% below the city median (£154.60) yet your 90‑day occupancy is only 44.6% (below the cohort median of 47.8%); consider a modest price increase or listing enhancements to capture more demand.
The title claims "Sleeps 6" while the capacity field shows only 4 guests – this discrepancy can deter bookings; update the title to reflect the correct guest limit.
No amenities are listed and photos are unknown; add at least 8 high‑quality images covering each room and list key amenities (free parking, Wi‑Fi, TV) to boost conversion.
analysis.outreach_hook: Your rate of £90 is 42% lower than the city median, yet your 90‑day occupancy sits at just 44.6%—there’s clear upside to raise bookings.
